benefits: Ramium repens, also known as creeping thyme, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and boost the immune system. The plant's essential oils, particularly thymol, have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a popular natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds.
